flavor_text.en: Its poison stinger is very powerful. Its bright-colored body is intended to warn off its enemies.
This Pokémon is known to bring blizzards. A shake of its massive body is enough to cause whiteout conditions.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During Pokémon Checkup, put 12 damage counters on that Pokémon instead of 1.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Empoisonné. Pendant le Contrôle Pokémon, placez 12 marqueurs de dégâts sur ce Pokémon-là au lieu d'un.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text.en: The small spikes covering its body developed from scales. They inject a toxin that causes fainting.

flavor_text.en: Constant polishing makes the edge of the blade on its tail extremely sharp. It's Zangoose's archrival.

Si vous avez placé des marqueurs de dégâts de cette façon, votre adversaire mélange tous les Pokémon de sa pile de défausse avec son deck.

flavor_text.en: It was bound to a fissure in an Odd Keystone as punishment for misdeeds 500 years ago.

flavor_text.en: Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text.en: It is usually motionless, but when attacked, it rotates at high speed and then crashes into its opponent.

flavor_text.en: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.

flavor_text.en: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.
When it evolves, it sheds the steel carapace that covered its whole body and develops a new one.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon's attacks do 20 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, les attaques du Pokémon Défenseur infligent 20 dégâts de moins (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

flavor_text.en: The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon's fur. People use it to mark the seasons.
It habitually shows off its strength with the size of sparks it creates by ramming its steel body into boulders.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 30 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 30 dégâts à chacun de vos Pokémon. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: While seeking iron for food, it digs tunnels by breaking through bedrock with its steel horns.

flavor_text.en: It has a body and heart of steel. It worked with its allies to punish people when they hurt Pokémon.

text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: They live in groups. The one with the longest, thickest, and most-scarred horns is the boss of the herd.
It was built 20 years ago by scientists who dreamed of exploring space. Their dreams have yet to come true.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: Even though it doesn't die in the vacuum of space, it can't move around very well in zero gravity.

text.en: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: A faulty update was added to its programming. Its behavior is noticeably strange, so the experiment may have been a failure.

flavor_text.en: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck's horns.

flavor_text.en: Its fur would all stand on end if it smelled a Seviper nearby. Its sharp claws tear up its foes.

flavor_text.en: Its form changes depending on the weather. The rougher conditions get, the rougher Castform's disposition!
flavor_text.fr:
Il n'y a pas que son apparence qui change en
fonction de la météo: son tempérament aussi !
Plus il y a de vent, plus il se montre agressif.

flavor_text.en: Its color changes for concealment and also when its mood or health changes. The darker the color, the healthier it is.

flavor_text.en: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It'll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries.
Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.

flavor_text.en: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use the frequency and rhythm of these flashes to communicate.

text.en: If 1 of your other Rapid Strike Pokémon used an attack during your last turn, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: Si l'un de vos autres Pokémon Mille Poings a utilisé une attaque pendant votre dernier tour, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 90 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu'à obtenir un côté pile. Cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

text.en: You may attach a Lightning Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Vous pouvez attacher une carte Énergie Lightning de votre main à l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: As it flies around, it shoots lightning all over the place and causes forest fires. It is therefore disliked.

text.en: If 1 of your other Rapid Strike Pokémon used an attack during your last turn, this attack also does 160 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Si l'un de vos autres Pokémon Mille Poings a utilisé une attaque pendant votre dernier tour, cette attaque inflige aussi 160 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: Because Galarian Slowpoke eat the seeds of a plant that grows only in Galar, their tails have developed a spicy flavor.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi.

flavor_text.en: With its gas-like body, it can sneak into any place it desires. However, it can be blown away by wind.
If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, Haunter is there.

text.en: This attack does 40 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque marqueur de dégâts sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: It is said to emerge from darkness to steal the lives of those who become lost in mountains.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Confus.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Confus.

flavor_text.en: If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, this attack does 160 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Si vous obtenez 2 côtés face, cette attaque inflige 160 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It roams through forests searching for sweet nectar. Although it boasts fantastic physical strength, it's not that good at flying.

text.en: Search your deck for up to 3 Kirlia and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 3 Kirlia, puis placez-les sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: It has a psychic power that enables it to distort the space around it and see into the future.

text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Psychic attachée à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: To protect its Trainer, it will expend all its psychic power to create a small black hole.
There's a proverb that says, "Shun the house where Shuppet gather in the growing dusk."

text.en: Put up to 7 damage counters on this Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter you placed in this way.
text.fr: Placez jusqu'à 7 marqueurs de dégâts sur ce Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque marqueur de dégâts placé de cette façon.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Confus.

flavor_text.en: Resentment at being cast off made it spring into being. Some say that treating it well will satisfy it, and it will once more become a stuffed toy.

text.en: Search your deck for a Psychic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. If you go second and it's your first turn, instead search for up to 3 Psychic Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck une carte Énergie Psychic, puis attachez-la à l'un de vos Pokémon. Si vous jouez en second et que c'est votre premier tour, cherchez jusqu'à 3 cartes Énergie Psychic à la place, puis attachez-les à l'un de vos Pokémon. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

text.en: If you have at least 5 Energy in play, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: Si vous avez au moins 5 Énergies en jeu, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Those who sleep holding Cresselia's feather are assured of joyful dreams. It is said to represent the crescent moon.
flavor_text.fr:
Dormir aec une de ses plumes à la main
permet de faire de beaux rêves. On le
surnomme « avatar d croissant de lune ».

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon was created from clay. It received orders from its master many thousands of years ago, and it still follows those orders to this day.

text.en: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: Si un Outil Pokémon est attaché à ce Pokémon, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: There's a theory that inside Golurk is a perpetual motion machine that produces limitless energy, but this belief hasn't been proven.

text.en: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 10 dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: The sweet smell of cotton candy perfumes Swirlix's fluffy fur. This Pokémon spits out sticky string to tangle up its enemies.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. Put a number of cards up to the number of heads from your discard pile into your hand.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Ajoutez à votre main un nombre de cartes de votre pile de défausse inférieur ou égal au nombre de côtés face obtenus.

flavor_text.en: Slurpuff's fur contains a lot of air, making it soft to the touch and lighter than it looks.
By exposing foes to the blinking of its luminescent spots, Inkay demoralizes them, and then it seizes the chance to flee.

text.en: Attach any number of Grass Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.
text.fr: Attachez le nombre de cartes Énergie Grass voulues de votre main à vos Pokémon comme il vous plaît.

text.en: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Échangez ce Pokémon contre l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

text.en: Reveal any number of Rapid Strike cards from your hand. This attack does 40 damage for each card you revealed in this way. Then, shuffle those cards into your deck.
text.fr: Montrez autant de cartes Mille Poings que vous le voulez de votre main. Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts pour chaque carte montrée de cette façon. Mélangez ensuite ces cartes avec votre deck.

flavor_text.en: It's said that Malamar's hypnotic powers played a role in certain history-changing events.
If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people.

text.en: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 30 dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer.

text.en: This attack does 50 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: If you're too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Special Energy or Stadium cards from their hand.
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, il ne peut pas jouer de cartes Énergie spéciale ou Stade de sa main.

text.en: Choose 2 of your opponent's Pokémon and put 5 damage counters on each of them.
text.fr: Choisissez 2 des Pokémon de votre adversaire, puis placez 5 marqueurs de dégâts sur chacun d'eux.

text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Psychic attachée à tous vos Pokémon.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts et les effets d'attaques infligés à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It burrows through the ground at a shallow depth. It leaves raised earth in its wake, making it easy to spot.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 60 damage for each heads. If all of them are heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts pour chaque côté face. S'il y a 3 côtés face, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts et les effets d'attaques infligés à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: These Diglett triplets dig over 60 miles below sea level. No one knows what it's like underground.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Résistance.

flavor_text.en: The stalks of leeks are thicker and longer in the Galar region. Farfetch'd that adapted to these stalks took on a unique form.

text.en: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 90 more damage, and this attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
text.fr: Si un Outil Pokémon est attaché à ce Pokémon, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires et les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Résistance.

flavor_text.en: After deflecting attacks with its hard leaf shield, it strikes back with its sharp leek stalk. The leek stalk is both weapon and food.

text.en: Search your deck for up to 2 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 2 Pokémon, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

text.en: Before doing damage, discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Avant d'infliger des dégâts, défaussez une Énergie spéciale du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Résistance.

text.en: This attack does 60 damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon V in play.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts pour chacun des Pokémon-V en jeu de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: Sharply attuned to others' wishes for help, this Pokémon seeks out those in need and aids them in battle.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It's said that this Pokémon was formed when an ancient clay tablet was drawn to a vengeful spirit.

text.en: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: Never touch its shadowlike body, or you'll be shown the horrific memories behind the picture carved into it.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: Crabrawler has been known to mistake Exeggutor for a coconut tree and climb it. The enraged Exeggutor shakes it off and stomps it.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: Before it stops to think, it just starts pummeling. There are records of its turning back avalanches with a flurry of punches.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, défaussez une Énergie du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: When it rubs the rocks on its neck against you, that's proof of its love for you. However, the rocks are sharp, so the gesture is quite painful!

text.en: This attack does 10 more damage for each Single Strike Pokémon in your discard pile.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Pokémon Poing Final dans votre pile de défausse.

flavor_text.en: They live alone without forming packs. They will only listen to orders from Trainers who can draw out their true power.

text.en: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: Passimian live in groups of about 20, with each member performing an assigned role. Through cooperation, the group survives.
The berries that grow around its belly are like ice pops. Galarian Darumaka absolutely love these berries.

text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à chacun des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

text.en: Move any amount of Energy from your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.
text.fr: Déplacez autant de cartes Énergie attachées à vos Pokémon que vous le voulez vers vos autres Pokémon, comme il vous plaît.

flavor_text.en: Its tentacles tear off easily, but it isn't alarmed when that happens—it knows they'll grow back. It's about as smart as a three-year-old.

text.en: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 80 more damage.
text.fr: Si vous avez le même nombre de cartes dans votre main que votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige 80 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.

text.en: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck une carte Énergie de base, puis attachez-la à ce Pokémon. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: If Kubfu pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from the depths of its belly.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Empoisonné.

flavor_text.en: It adores polluted air. Some claim that Koffing used to be more plentiful in the Galar region than they are now.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused. Attach a Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Confus. Attachez une carte Énergie Darkness de votre pile de défausse à ce Pokémon.

text.en: This attack does 20 more damage for each Darkness Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Darkness attachée à tous vos Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Very rarely, a sudden mutation can result in two small Koffing twins becoming conjoined as a Weezing.
Long ago, during a time when droves of factories fouled the air with pollution, Weezing changed into this form for some reason.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: While chanting strange spells, this Pokémon combines its internal toxins with what it's eaten, creating strange potions.

text.en: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.
text.fr: Défaussez une carte de votre main. Dans ce cas, piochez 3 cartes.

text.en: At the end of your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon will be Knocked Out.
text.fr: À la fin du prochain tour de votre adversaire, le Pokémon Défenseur sera mis K.O.
